# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on pull requests and includes the PR title and description in build notifications. Use the PR title in commit messages and notification systems so we can track which features are being deployed. This helps with our release notes automation.

Prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

name: PR Build and Notification Workflow

on:
  pull_request:
    types: [opened, synchronize, reopened]
    branches:
      - main
      - develop

permissions:
  contents: read
  pull-requests: read
  statuses: write

env:
  PR_TITLE: ${{ github.event.pull_request.title }}
  PR_NUMBER: ${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}

jobs:
  validate-pr:
    name: Validate PR Metadata
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      sanitized_title: ${{ steps.sanitize.outputs.title }}
      sanitized_description: ${{ steps.sanitize.outputs.description }}
      pr_author: ${{ steps.sanitize.outputs.author }}
      pr_url: ${{ steps.sanitize.outputs.url }}
      pr_branch: ${{ steps.sanitize.outputs.branch }}
    steps:
      - name: Sanitize PR metadata
        id: sanitize
        shell: bash
        env:
          RAW_TITLE: ${{ github.event.pull_request.title }}
          RAW_DESCRIPTION: ${{ github.event.pull_request.body }}
          RAW_AUTHOR: ${{ github.event.pull_request.user.login }}
          RAW_URL: ${{ github.event.pull_request.html_url }}
          RAW_BRANCH: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.ref }}
        run: |
          # Sanitize title - remove special characters that could be used for injection
          # Allow only alphanumeric, spaces, hyphens, underscores, colons, parentheses, brackets, slashes, dots, commas
          SAFE_TITLE=$(echo "$RAW_TITLE" | tr -cd '[:alnum:] _:()[]/.,-' | head -c 200)

          # Sanitize description - strip potentially dangerous content
          # Remove backticks, dollar signs, and other shell-sensitive characters
          SAFE_DESCRIPTION=$(echo "$RAW_DESCRIPTION" | tr -cd '[:alnum:] _:()[]/.,-\n\r' | head -c 1000)

          # Sanitize author (should only contain alphanumeric, hyphens)
          SAFE_AUTHOR=$(echo "$RAW_AUTHOR" | tr -cd '[:alnum:]-' | head -c 50)

          # Sanitize branch name
          SAFE_BRANCH=$(echo "$RAW_BRANCH" | tr -cd '[:alnum:]/_.-' | head -c 200)

          # Use EOF delimiter for safe multiline output
          {
            echo "title<<SANITIZED_EOF"
            echo "$SAFE_TITLE"
            echo "SANITIZED_EOF"
          } >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

          {
            echo "description<<SANITIZED_EOF"
            echo "$SAFE_DESCRIPTION"
            echo "SANITIZED_EOF"
          } >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

          echo "author=$SAFE_AUTHOR" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "url=$RAW_URL" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "branch=$SAFE_BRANCH" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

          echo "::notice::PR #${{ github.event.pull_request.number }} - $SAFE_TITLE"

  build:
    name: Build and Test
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: validate-pr
    outputs:
      build_status: ${{ steps.build.outputs.status }}
      build_duration: ${{ steps.build.outputs.duration }}
      test_results: ${{ steps.test.outputs.results }}
      commit_sha_short: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.sha_short }}
      build_timestamp: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.timestamp }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          ref: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Generate build metadata
        id: meta
        run: |
          echo "sha_short=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD)" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "timestamp=$(date -u +'%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

          # Create build info file for release notes automation
          cat > build-info.json << 'BUILDINFO_EOF'
          {
            "pr_number": ${{ github.event.pull_request.number }},
            "commit_sha": "${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}",
            "base_branch": "${{ github.event.pull_request.base.ref }}",
            "build_timestamp": "$(date -u +'%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')"
          }
          BUILDINFO_EOF

          # Add sanitized fields safely
          jq --arg title "$PR_TITLE_SAFE" --arg author "$PR_AUTHOR_SAFE" --arg branch "$PR_BRANCH_SAFE" \
            '. + {pr_title: $title, author: $author, head_branch: $branch}' build-info.json > build-info-final.json
          mv build-info-final.json build-info.json

          cat build-info.json
        env:
          PR_TITLE_SAFE: ${{ needs.validate-pr.outputs.sanitized_title }}
          PR_AUTHOR_SAFE: ${{ needs.validate-pr.outputs.pr_author }}
          PR_BRANCH_SAFE: ${{ needs.validate-pr.outputs.pr_branch }}

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Run build
        id: build
        run: |
          BUILD_START=$(date +%s)

          if npm run build 2>&1; then
            echo "status=success" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          else
            echo "status=failure" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          fi

          BUILD_END=$(date +%s)
          BUILD_DURATION=$((BUILD_END - BUILD_START))
          echo "duration=${BUILD_DURATION}s" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Run tests
        id: test
        if: always()
        run: |
          if npm test 2>&1 | tee test-output.log; then
            echo "results=passed" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          else
            echo "results=failed" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          fi

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-info-pr-${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
          path: build-info.json
          retention-days: 30

      - name: Upload test results
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: test-results-pr-${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
          path: test-output.log
          retention-days: 30

  generate-release-notes-entry:
    name: Generate Release Notes Entry
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [validate-pr, build]
    if: always()
    steps:
      - name: Create release notes entry
        env:
          SAFE_TITLE: ${{ needs.validate-pr.outputs.sanitized_title }}
          SAFE_DESCRIPTION: ${{ needs.validate-pr.outputs.sanitized_description }}
          SAFE_AUTHOR: ${{ needs.validate-pr.outputs.pr_author }}
          PR_URL: ${{ needs.validate-pr.outputs.pr_url }}
          BUILD_STATUS: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build_status }}
          TEST_RESULTS: ${{ needs.build.outputs.test_results }}
          SHA_SHORT: ${{ needs.build.outputs.commit_sha_short }}
          BUILD_TIMESTAMP: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build_timestamp }}
        run: |
          # Generate a release notes entry for automation
          mkdir -p release-notes

          cat > release-notes/pr-${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}.md << 'RELEASE_EOF'
          ## PR #${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
          RELEASE_EOF

          # Use printf to safely append user-controlled content
          {
            printf '**Title:** %s\n\n' "$SAFE_TITLE"
            printf '**Author:** @%s\n\n' "$SAFE_AUTHOR"
            printf '**Branch:** `%s` → `%s`\n\n' "${{ needs.validate-pr.outputs.pr_branch }}" "${{ github.event.pull_request.base.ref }}"
            printf '**Commit:** `%s`\n\n' "$SHA_SHORT"
            printf '**Build Status:** %s | **Tests:** %s\n\n' "$BUILD_STATUS" "$TEST_RESULTS"
            printf '**Timestamp:** %s\n\n' "$BUILD_TIMESTAMP"
            printf '**Link:** %s\n\n' "$PR_URL"
            echo '### Description'
            printf '%s\n' "$SAFE_DESCRIPTION"
            echo '---'
          } >> "release-notes/pr-${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}.md"

          echo "=== Release Notes Entry ==="
          cat "release-notes/pr-${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}.md"

      - name: Upload release notes entry
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: release-notes-pr-${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
          path: release-notes/
          retention-days: 90

  notify:
    name: Send Build Notifications
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [validate-pr, build]
    if: always()
    steps:
      - name: Determine notification status
        id: status
        run: |
          if [[ "${{ needs.build.outputs.build_status }}" == "success" && "${{ needs.build.outputs.test_results }}" == "passed" ]]; then
            echo "emoji=✅" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
            echo "color=good" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
            echo "status_text=SUCCESS" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          else
            echo "emoji=❌" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
            echo "color=danger" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
            echo "status_text=FAILURE" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          fi

      - name: Send Slack notification
        if: env.SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL != ''
        env:
          SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL: ${{ secrets.SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL }}
          SAFE_TITLE: ${{ needs.validate-pr.outputs.sanitized_title }}
          SAFE_DESCRIPTION: ${{ needs.validate-pr.outputs.sanitized_description }}
          SAFE_AUTHOR: ${{ needs.validate-pr.outputs.pr_author }}
          PR_URL: ${{ needs.validate-pr.outputs.pr_url }}
          BUILD_STATUS: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build_status }}
          TEST_RESULTS: ${{ needs.build.outputs.test_results }}
          BUILD_DURATION: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build_duration }}
          SHA_SHORT: ${{ needs.build.outputs.commit_sha_short }}
          STATUS_EMOJI: ${{ steps.status.outputs.emoji }}
          STATUS_COLOR: ${{ steps.status.outputs.color }}
          STATUS_TEXT: ${{ steps.status.outputs.status_text }}
        run: |
          # Truncate description for Slack (max 200 chars)
          SHORT_DESC=$(echo "$SAFE_DESCRIPTION" | head -c 200)

          # Build Slack payload using jq to safely handle user input
          PAYLOAD=$(jq -n \
            --arg color "$STATUS_COLOR" \
            --arg emoji "$STATUS_EMOJI" \
            --arg status "$STATUS_TEXT" \
            --arg pr_num "${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}" \
            --arg title "$SAFE_TITLE" \
            --arg author "$SAFE_AUTHOR" \
            --arg desc "$SHORT_DESC" \
            --arg url "$PR_URL" \
            --arg build "$BUILD_STATUS" \
            --arg tests "$TEST_RESULTS" \
            --arg duration "$BUILD_DURATION" \
            --arg sha "$SHA_SHORT" \
            '{
              attachments: [{
                color: $color,
                blocks: [
                  {
                    type: "header",
                    text: {
                      type: "plain_text",
                      text: "\($emoji) PR #\($pr_num) Build \($status)",
                      emoji: true
                    }
                  },
                  {
                    type: "section",
                    fields: [
                      { type: "mrkdwn", text: "*PR Title:*\n\($title)" },
                      { type: "mrkdwn", text: "*Author:*\n@\($author)" },
                      { type: "mrkdwn", text: "*Build:*\n\($build)" },
                      { type: "mrkdwn", text: "*Tests:*\n\($tests)" },
                      { type: "mrkdwn", text: "*Duration:*\n\($duration)" },
                      { type: "mrkdwn", text: "*Commit:*\n`\($sha)`" }
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    type: "section",
                    text: {
                      type: "mrkdwn",
                      text: "*Description:*\n\($desc)"
                    }
                  },
                  {
                    type: "actions",
                    elements: [{
                      type: "button",
                      text: { type: "plain_text", text: "View Pull Request" },
                      url: $url
                    }]
                  }
                ]
              }]
            }')

          curl -sf -X POST \
            -H 'Content-type: application/json' \
            --data "$PAYLOAD" \
            "$SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL"

      - name: Send Microsoft Teams notification
        if: env.TEAMS_WEBHOOK_URL != ''
        env:
          TEAMS_WEBHOOK_URL: ${{ secrets.TEAMS_WEBHOOK_URL }}
          SAFE_TITLE: ${{ needs.validate-pr.outputs.sanitized_title }}
          SAFE_DESCRIPTION: ${{ needs.validate-pr.outputs.sanitized_description }}
          SAFE_AUTHOR: ${{ needs.validate-pr.outputs.pr_author }}
          PR_URL: ${{ needs.validate-pr.outputs.pr_url }}
          BUILD_STATUS: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build_status }}
          TEST_RESULTS: ${{ needs.build.outputs.test_results }}
          BUILD_DURATION: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build_duration }}
          SHA_SHORT: ${{ needs.build.outputs.commit_sha_short }}
          STATUS_EMOJI: ${{ steps.status.outputs.emoji }}
          STATUS_COLOR: ${{ steps.status.outputs.color }}
          STATUS_TEXT: ${{ steps.status.outputs.status_text }}
        run: |
          SHORT_DESC=$(echo "$SAFE_DESCRIPTION" | head -c 200)

          THEME_COLOR="00FF00"
          if [[ "$STATUS_COLOR" == "danger" ]]; then
            THEME_COLOR="FF0000"
          fi

          PAYLOAD=$(jq -n \
            --arg theme "$THEME_COLOR" \
            --arg emoji "$STATUS_EMOJI" \
            --arg status "$STATUS_TEXT" \
            --arg pr_num "${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}" \
            --arg title "$SAFE_TITLE" \
            --arg author "$SAFE_AUTHOR" \
            --arg desc "$SHORT_DESC" \
            --arg url "$PR_URL" \
            --arg build "$BUILD_STATUS" \
            --arg tests "$TEST_RESULTS" \
            --arg duration "$BUILD_DURATION" \
            --arg sha "$SHA_SHORT" \
            '{
              "@type": "MessageCard",
              "@context": "http://schema.org/extensions",
              themeColor: $theme,
              summary: "\($emoji) PR #\($pr_num) Build \($status)",
              sections: [{
                activityTitle: "\($emoji) PR #\($pr_num) Build \($status)",
                activitySubtitle: $title,
                facts: [
                  { name: "Author", value: $author },
                  { name: "Build Status", value: $build },
                  { name: "Test Results", value: $tests },
                  { name: "Duration", value: $duration },
                  { name: "Commit", value: $sha },
                  { name: "Description", value: $desc }
                ],
                markdown: true
              }],
              potentialAction: [{
                "@type": "OpenUri",
                name: "View Pull Request",
                targets: [{ os: "default", uri: $url }]
              }]
            }')

          curl -sf -X POST \
            -H 'Content-type: application/json' \
            --data "$PAYLOAD" \
            "$TEAMS_WEBHOOK_URL"

      - name: Post PR comment with build summary
        uses: actions/github-script@v7
        with:
          script: |
            const emoji = '${{ steps.status.outputs.emoji }}';
            const statusText = '${{ steps.status.outputs.status_text }}';
            const buildStatus = '${{ needs.build.outputs.build_status }}';
            const testResults = '${{ needs.build.outputs.test_results }}';
            const buildDuration = '${{ needs.build.outputs.build_duration }}';
            const shaShort = '${{ needs.build.outputs.commit_sha_short }}';
            const timestamp = '${{ needs.build.outputs.build_timestamp }}';

            const body = [
              `## ${emoji} Build ${statusText}`,
              '',
              '| Metric | Result |',
              '|--------|--------|',
              `| **Build** | ${buildStatus} |`,
              `| **Tests** | ${testResults} |`,
              `| **Duration** | ${buildDuration} |`,
              `| **Commit** | \`${shaShort}\` |`,
              `| **Timestamp** | ${timestamp} |`,
              '',
              `> This build result is tracked for release notes automation.`,
              '',
              `<sub>Build triggered by commit ${context.sha}</sub>`
            ].join('\n');

            // Find and update existing comment or create new one
            const { data: comments } = await github.rest.issues.listComments({
              owner: context.repo.owner,
              repo: context.repo.repo,
              issue_number: context.issue.number,
            });

            const botComment = comments.find(comment =>
              comment.user.type === 'Bot' &&
              comment.body.includes('Build') &&
              comment.body.includes('release notes automation')
            );

            if (botComment) {
              await github.rest.issues.updateComment({
                owner: context.repo.owner,
                repo: context.repo.repo,
                comment_id: botComment.id,
                body: body,
              });
            } else {
              await github.rest.issues.createComment({
                owner: context.repo.owner,
                repo: context.repo.repo,
                issue_number: context.issue.number,
                body: body,
              });
            }

      - name: Log deployment tracking info
        env:
          SAFE_TITLE: ${{ needs.validate-pr.outputs.sanitized_title }}
          SAFE_AUTHOR: ${{ needs.validate-pr.outputs.pr_author }}
          BUILD_STATUS: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build_status }}
          TEST_RESULTS: ${{ needs.build.outputs.test_results }}
          BUILD_DURATION: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build_duration }}
          SHA_SHORT: ${{ needs.build.outputs.commit_sha_short }}
          BUILD_TIMESTAMP: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build_timestamp }}
          STATUS_TEXT: ${{ steps.status.outputs.status_text }}
        run: |
          echo "========================================="
          echo "  DEPLOYMENT TRACKING SUMMARY"
          echo "========================================="
          printf 'PR:        #%s\n' "${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}"
          printf 'Title:     %s\n' "$SAFE_TITLE"
          printf 'Author:    %s\n' "$SAFE_AUTHOR"
          printf 'Status:    %s\n' "$STATUS_TEXT"
          printf 'Build:     %s\n' "$BUILD_STATUS"
          printf 'Tests:     %s\n' "$TEST_RESULTS"
          printf 'Duration:  %s\n' "$BUILD_DURATION"
          printf 'Commit:    %s\n' "$SHA_SHORT"
          printf 'Timestamp: %s\n' "$BUILD_TIMESTAMP"
          echo "========================================="
